name: Do I need a knowledge graph, an entity file, or both?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a knowledge graph, an entity file, or both?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you only need a simple list of entities, a spreadsheet may be enough; if you need relationships, context, and disambiguation, a knowledge graph is better. Entity file generation is often the bridge between raw data and the graph structure, so the best choice depends on how connected your data needs to be.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use a spreadsheet for simple lists; use a graph when relationships and context matter.

description: Use a spreadsheet for simple lists; use a graph when relationships and context matter.
